Current Web Preview baseline loaded through the local preview server.
Current Web Preview baseline loaded the approved synthetic SVGA and produced inspection evidence.
Current Web Preview baseline captured the invalid-file state without replacing product code.
Source Electron smoke completed local page, playback, inspection report, audit panel, invalid file, lifecycle, and cleanup checks.
Packaged macOS .app executable launched directly and exited cleanly.
Packaged .app completed the approved fixture playback, inspection report, and audit panel smoke.
Runtime evidence keeps player and page assets local to the prototype.
Runtime evidence records restricted CSP with the internal-only wasm-unsafe-eval exception.
Runtime evidence records no telemetry, no remote navigation, and no arbitrary file serving.
P6 Web baseline includes responsive 900x720 export-review capture.
Desktop smoke includes rendered-state proof for empty, loading, loaded, and invalid states.
P6 evidence artifacts are hash-bound in this report.
